{{Quote|Nym is the most feared pirate in the Maramere system. He routed the Trade Federation from Lok and its neighboring planets right around the start of the Clone Wars.|[[Vana Sage]]|<ref name="SWG:MVS">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Meet Vana Sage|Lok}}</ref>}}
The '''Occupation of [[Karthakk system's sun|Karthakk]]''' was a conflict during and before the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. The conflict began in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], when the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] began testing its war vehicles on the [[Karthakk system|system's]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], and came to a head in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] when the Federation was assisted by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Cavik Toth]].
{{Battle-stub}}
